title: viola × brauniae
intro: Viola × brauniae, also known as the Braun's pansy orchid, is a hybrid of Viola sororia and Viola sororia var. sororia, resulting in a unique and rare plant species. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain types of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Viola × brauniae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Viola × brauniae can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to promote skin health and reduce symptoms of minor injuries.
